name: vertex-dtl
description: Tests de integracion en Node para el ejecutable Vertex DTL.

scripts.ci: bun install --frozen-lockfile && cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo build --all-targets --locked && cargo test --locked && cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features --locked -- -D warnings && bun run fmt:check && bun run build && bun test --timeout 30000 ./tests/node
